channel.title: ByteByteGo Newsletter
channel.description: Explain complex systems with simple terms, from the authors of the best-selling system design book series. Join over 1,000,000 friendly readers.

item.title: 【Our New Book on Behavioral Interviews Is Now Available on Amazon】我们关于行为访谈的新书现已在亚马逊上发售
item.description: 【The book is written by Steve Huynh and published by ByteByteGo.】该书由 Steve Huynh 撰写，由 ByteByteGo 出版。

item.title: 【Database Performance Strategies and Their Hidden Costs】数据库性能策略及其隐藏成本
item.description: 【A feature is deployed, and the database queries run well.】功能已部署，数据库查询运行良好。

item.title: 【How Datadog Redefined Data Replication】Datadog 如何重新定义数据复制
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how Datadog implemented the changes and the challenges they faced.】在本文中，我们将了解 Datadog 如何实施这些变更以及他们面临的挑战。

item.title: 【How Meta Turned Debugging Into a Product】Meta 如何将调试变成产品
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at how DrP works on a high level and the design choices Meta made while building it.】在本文中，我们将了解 DrP 如何在高层次上工作以及 Meta 在构建它时所做的设计选择。

item.title: 【How Roblox Uses AI to Translate 16 Languages in 100 Milliseconds】Roblox 如何利用 AI 在 100 毫秒内翻译 16 种语言
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at what Roblox built and the trade-offs they made.】在本文中，我们将了解 Roblox 的构建以及他们所做的权衡。

item.title: 【EP208: Load Balancer vs API Gateway】EP208：负载均衡器与 API 网关
item.description: 【Load balancers and API gateways both sit between your clients and backend servers.】负载均衡器和 API 网关都位于客户端和后端服务器之间。

item.title: 【LAST CALL FOR ENROLLMENT: Become an AI Engineer - Cohort 5 】最后报名：成为人工智能工程师 - 第 5 组
item.description: 【Our 5th cohort of Becoming an AI Engineer starts tomorrow, March 28. This is a live, cohort-based course created in collaboration with best-selling author Ali Aminian and published by ByteByteGo.】我们的第五期“成为人工智能工程师”课程将于明天 3 月 28 日开始。这是一门基于群组的实时课程，与畅销书作家 Ali Aminian 合作创建，由 ByteByteGo 出版。

item.title: 【How to Implement API Security】如何实施 API 安全
item.description: 【Most APIs that ship to production have some security in place. Most of the time, HTTPS is enabled, an API key is required, and maybe there’s even a quick code review before deployment.】大多数交付到生产环境的 API 都具有一定的安全性。大多数时候，启用 HTTPS，需要 API 密钥，甚至可能在部署之前进行快速代码审查。

item.title: 【How Anthropic’s Claude Thinks】Anthropic 的克劳德是如何思考的
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at what the Claude researchers found.】在本文中，我们将看看克劳德研究人员的发现。

item.title: 【How Netflix Live Streams to 100 Million Devices in 60 Seconds】Netflix 如何在 60 秒内向 1 亿台设备进行直播
item.description: 【In this article, we will look at the architecture of this system and the challenges Netflix faced while building it.】在本文中，我们将了解该系统的架构以及 Netflix 在构建该系统时面临的挑战。
